name: Customers Bancorp Inc Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series E
summary: Customers Bancorp Inc Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series E represents a series of preferred stock issued by Customers Bancorp, a bank holding company. These preferred shares pay a dividend that is initially fixed and then floats at a spread over a benchmark rate. Customers Bancorp is based in Pennsylvania.
